message: ci: checkpoint sweep every fifty reviews

files.patch:
@@ -79,8 +79,8 @@ Requires Node 24.
 source ~/.profile
 npm install
 npm run build
-npm run plan -- --batch-size 20 --shard-count 10 --max-pages 250 --codex-model gpt-5.4 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast
-npm run review -- --openclaw-dir ../openclaw --batch-size 20 --max-pages 250 --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews --codex-model gpt-5.4 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast --codex-timeout-ms 600000
+npm run plan -- --batch-size 5 --shard-count 10 --max-pages 250 --codex-model gpt-5.4 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast
+npm run review -- --openclaw-dir ../openclaw --batch-size 5 --max-pages 250 --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews --codex-model gpt-5.4 --codex-reasoning-effort high --codex-service-tier fast --codex-timeout-ms 600000
 npm run apply-artifacts -- --artifact-dir artifacts/reviews
 ```
